items.title: Saifuddin credits better adaptation as Bangladesh level T20I series
items.summary: After levelling the T20I series against Zimbabwe, Mohammad Saifuddin revealed how team discussions helped Bangladesh adapt to the conditions, even as Nahid Rana picked up a side strain

items.title: All-round Bangladesh level series in Bulawayo
items.summary: Rishad Hossain and Mahedi Hasan shared seven wickets as Zimbabwe were bowled out for 152 chasing a 187-run target

items.title: Openers, Mahedi and Rishad help Bangladesh keep series alive
items.summary: Zimbabwe were sloppy in the field and lost wickets in clusters with the bat

items.title: Saifuddin fireworks, Rishad four-fer keep Tigers alive
items.summary: Half-centuries from openers Saif Hassan and Tanzid Tamim, followed by a blistering late cameo from Mohammad Saifuddin and a four-wicket haul from Rishad Hossain, powered Bangladesh to a 34-run victory over Zimbabwe in the second T20I of the three-match series in Bulawayo on Friday.

items.title: Unchanged Zimbabwe put Bangladesh in to bat
items.summary: Bangladesh brought in Rishad Hossain for Nasum Ahmed

items.title: Pakistan cricketer handed three-month ban over positive drugs test
items.summary: Mohammad Nawaz has been sanctioned by the International Cricket Council (ICC) after testing positive for a cannabis-related substance, the governing body said on Friday, with the Pakistan all-rounder being handed a three-month ban that can be reduced upon completion of a rehabilitation programme.

items.title: Buoyant Zimbabwe eye series win against depleted Bangladesh
items.summary: Bangladesh have now lost their last five T20Is and need their top order to fire

items.title: Australia internationals unlikely to play much WNCL
items.summary: Australia's series against Bangladesh, New Zealand and the women's Champions Trophy, as well as the WPL likely to keep their best away from domestic cricket

items.title: Ngarava, Muzarabani sink Bangladesh in T20I opener
items.summary: Chasing 171, Bangladesh suffered an early collapse, losing Saif Hassan (12), Tanzid Hasan Tamim (16) and Parvez Hossain Emon (5) inside the powerplay to slump to 34 for three.

items.title: Muzarabani and Ngarava overwhelm Bangladesh again
items.summary: The two Zimbabwe quicks picked up four wickets each to defend a total of 170

items.title: Bangladesh get Taskin Ahmed boost as they bowl in Bulawayo
items.summary: Taskin was not part of Bangladesh's squad, but got called up after an injury to Mustafizur Rahman

items.title: Tigers look to turn the tide in T20Is
items.summary: With the likes of Nahid Rana, Shoriful Islam and Taskin in the bowling attack, Hridoy said Bangladesh are aware of their strengths and are determined to bounce back.

items.title: High-flying Zimbabwe meet under-strength Bangladesh in T20I series opener
items.summary: Already without Litton, Mehidy, Taskin and Mahmud, Bangladesh will also miss the injured Mustafizur
